series.additionalNames: 初音ミク「マジカルミライ」
series.description: Hatsune Miku "Magical Mirai" (初音ミク「マジカルミライ」) is an annual festival organized by Crypton Future Media and Tokyo MX that celebrates the creative culture surrounding Hatsune Miku, both an exhibition and a 3DCG live show are held since 2013.
